For S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Defend the Delete Version Marker model · Theory Delete Version Marker, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: DELETE always erases the object bytes immediately and permanently. Type annotations, generated SDK shapes, and resolved promises do not strengthen that runtime claim.
